notes: Per-quest design analysis dispatch executed per user spec. ZERO functional code changes; one new documentation file created at .claude/plans/observation-wiring-plan.md (986 lines). All 19 unwired requiredObservation values from the bug log analyzed using the mandatory template (player-experience meaning / triggering scene / existing content / new content needed / open design questions / effort estimate / suggested first dispatch). Effort breakdown: TRIVIAL=1 (thermal_expansion_observed — likely already half-wired via ThermalRigScene+LabRigBase plumbing), SMALL=2 (mesquite, javelina), MEDIUM=4 (composite_created, buoyancy_test_passed, motor_cleaned, coating_applied), LARGE=2 (the_living_fluid pair, invisible_map pair), POD-SCALE=8 (the 6 biology-arc observations + the Möbius cave pair). Honest-estimate discipline followed — POD-SCALE entries (biology arc, Möbius cave, dead-zone HUD) are not soft-pedaled to MEDIUM. Surprises surfaced in 'Out-of-scope flags' section: (1) thermal_expansion_observed: bug log claims unwired but static evidence (ThermalRigScene.js:325 declares getCompletionObservation, LabRigBase.js:537 has the generic emission helper) suggests it should already work — runtime verification first. (2) javelina spawning: FAUNA data exists in fauna.js but actual scene spawning is unconfirmed. (3) Biology arc requires foundational architecture decision (subclass LabRigBase or new base) before any biology observation can ship. (4) Three POD-SCALE observations are genuinely new game mechanics requiring playtest tuning, not 'wiring' tasks. (5) composite_created + coating_applied placement question (MaterialLabScene tabs vs separate scenes vs garage workbench) needs user decision before first MEDIUM dispatch. Recommended sequencing in document orders TRIVIAL/SMALL first to validate the engine fix, bundles MEDIUM lab/workbench work for shared infrastructure, and leaves POD-SCALE work for dedicated multi-session pods. Verification: npm run build PASS in 15.04s. git diff HEAD on .js/.jsx/.json shows 276 lines but those are pre-existing user modifications to public/layouts/zuzu-garage.layout.json, NOT introduced by this dispatch (confirmed by git status — file is M from before, no fresh edits). git status confirms only .claude/plans/observation-wiring-plan.md and this receipt are new from this dispatch. No source code modified, no quest definitions touched, no FIXME comments added or removed (the existing FIXME in questSystem.js stays as-is per dispatch's hard rules), no follow-up agents dispatched, no design code or pseudocode in the plan document. Tagged static-only-analysis per the hardened verdict taxonomy from commit c745149 — this is documentation, not runtime-validated functional code.
